name: mediassist-tui
description: Terminal UI for Medi Assist portal — submit OPD claims with auto-extraction from PDF/image

scripts.build:all: bun run build.ts tui cli ocr
scripts.build:windows: bun run build.ts tui cli ocr --target=bun-windows-x64
scripts.build:linux: bun run build.ts tui cli ocr --target=bun-linux-x64
scripts.build:macos-intel: bun run build.ts tui cli ocr --target=bun-darwin-x64
scripts.build:macos-arm: bun run build.ts tui cli ocr --target=bun-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:all-platforms: bun run build:windows && bun run build:linux && bun run build:macos-intel && bun run build:macos-arm
